## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Maintenance

## Platforms

- [ ] Android
- [ ] iOS
- [ ] Electron
- [ ] Web stub
- [ ] TypeScript API only
- [ ] Documentation only

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run test:ts`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `cd android && ./gradlew test`
- [ ] `npm run verify:ios`
- [ ] Manual test in a Capacitor app or playground
- [ ] Not applicable

## Checklist

- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in `src/definitions.ts` JSDoc.
- [ ] Documentation or examples were updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` was updated for user-visible changes.
- [ ] Native behavior remains aligned across Android, iOS, and Electron where possible.
- [ ] Byte payloads and buffer sizes are validated before allocation.
